name: turnstile
description: Opinionated, gated workflow for solo development: conversate, brainstorm, refine, breakdown, spec, sprint-plan, work, and review epics, stories, and tasks on a file-based board, plus independent debugging and code review, with a persistent, Obsidian-linked knowledge brain.

interface.shortDescription: Gate-first workflow: one ticket at a time, nothing ships without passing its gate.
